description.value: Aura faint necromancy; CL 3rd; Slot armor; Price 3,325 gp; Weight 25 lbs. DESCRIPTION This +1 hide armor appears to be made from a horrific amalgam of rotted animal pelts and animal bones, and is usually decorated with the skulls of tiny rodents or vermin and trimmed with the fur of a black wolf. The wearer can use disguise self and unnatural lust each once per day. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells disguise self, unnatural lust; Price 1,745 gp
